timestamp.description: Dump timestamp label (derived from object prefix).

sql.description: Public URL for the compressed SQL dump file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 digest value for the dump when available.

sha256_url.description: Public URL to a `.sha256` checksum file.

manifest.description: Public URL to a manifest JSON file for the dump.

size_bytes.description: Dump file size in bytes when available.

warning.description: Warning message when metadata is incomplete.
